home.headline: Data, marketing & automation — all at once.
home.subheadline: Data analyst with a digital marketing background.
home.bio: Data and marketing analyst. Dashboards that tell stories, automations that save time, and websites that convert. If it solves a problem, I build it.
home.ctaSubtext: I'm open to new projects and collaborations.
home.servicesTitle: What I can do for your business
home.service1Description: I turn your business data into visual dashboards that show what's working and what needs attention — no spreadsheets required.
home.service2Description: That repetitive task someone does by hand every day? I build systems that do it automatically, with no errors and no delays.
home.service3Description: I create professional, fast, mobile-friendly websites — built to turn visitors into customers.
home.service4Description: I manage your online ad campaigns to bring the right audience, with full control of what goes in and what comes out.
